sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n56427" key="kekothw/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κεκοτηώς</orth>, <sense id="n56427.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">κοτέω</ref></xr>. <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κεκράανται</orth>, <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κεκράαντο</orth>, <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">κραίνω</ref></xr>.</sense> </entryFree>
